inputs.label: Field Elevation (ft)
inputs.businessContext: Elevation of the location above mean sea level in feet. Use either this or the meters input.

businessContext_i18n.en: Elevation of the location above mean sea level in feet. Use either this or the meters input.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Konumun ortalama deniz seviyesinden fit cinsinden yüksekliği. Bunu veya metre girişini kullanın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe des Standorts über dem mittleren Meeresspiegel in Fuß. Verwenden Sie entweder dies oder die Meter-Eingabe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Élévation du lieu au-dessus du niveau moyen de la mer en pieds. Utilisez ceci ou l'entrée en mètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Elevación del lugar sobre el nivel medio del mar en pies. Use esta o la entrada en metros.

inputs.label: Field Elevation (m)
inputs.businessContext: Elevation of the location above mean sea level in meters. Used only if fieldElevation is 0.

businessContext_i18n.en: Elevation of the location above mean sea level in meters. Used only if fieldElevation is 0.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Konumun ortalama deniz seviyesinden metre cinsinden yüksekliği. Yalnızca sahaYüksekliği 0 ise kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe des Standorts über dem mittleren Meeresspiegel in Metern. Wird nur verwendet, wenn Feldhöhe 0 ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Élévation du lieu au-dessus du niveau moyen de la mer en mètres. Utilisé uniquement si fieldElevation est 0.
businessContext_i18n.es: Elevación del lugar sobre el nivel medio del mar en metros. Se usa solo si fieldElevation es 0.

inputs.label: Altimeter Setting (inHg)
inputs.businessContext: Current altimeter setting or QNH in inches of mercury. Use either this or QNH hPa.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current altimeter setting or QNH in inches of mercury. Use either this or QNH hPa.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İnç cıva cinsinden mevcut altimetre ayarı veya QNH. Bunu veya QNH hPa'yı kullanın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktuelle Höhenmessereinstellung oder QNH in Zoll Quecksilbersäule. Verwenden Sie entweder dies oder QNH hPa.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Calage altimétrique ou QNH actuel en pouces de mercure. Utilisez ceci ou QNH hPa.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ajuste actual del altímetro o QNH en pulgadas de mercurio. Use esta o QNH hPa.

inputs.label: QNH (hPa)
inputs.businessContext: Current altimeter setting or QNH in hectopascals. Used only if altimeterSetting is 0.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current altimeter setting or QNH in hectopascals. Used only if altimeterSetting is 0.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hektopaskal cinsinden mevcut altimetre ayarı veya QNH. Yalnızca altimetreAyarı 0 ise kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktuelle Höhenmessereinstellung oder QNH in Hektopascal. Wird nur verwendet, wenn Höhenmessereinstellung 0 ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Calage altimétrique ou QNH actuel en hectopascals. Utilisé uniquement si altimeterSetting est 0.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ajuste actual del altímetro o QNH en hectopascales. Se usa solo si altimeterSetting es 0.

inputs.label: Standard Pressure (inHg)
inputs.businessContext: Standard pressure at sea level in inches of mercury. Normally 29.92 inHg.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard pressure at sea level in inches of mercury. Normally 29.92 inHg.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Deniz seviyesinde inç cıva cinsinden standart basınç. Normalde 29.92 inHg.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standarddruck auf Meereshöhe in Zoll Quecksilbersäule. Normalerweise 29,92 inHg.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression standard au niveau de la mer en pouces de mercure. Normalement 29,92 inHg.
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión estándar a nivel del mar en pulgadas de mercurio. Normalmente 29.92 inHg.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
